title: zombie apocalypse server
description: Experience never seen zombie apocalypse multiplayer with guns for fabric
body:
**Zombie Apocalypse Server Modpack for Fabric**  
*Challenge your friends to survive a zombie apocalypse on any multiplayer server!*

**Overview:**  
The *Zombie Apocalypse Server* Modpack is built for intense, multiplayer zombie survival on Fabric, optimized to run smoothly in server environments. With smart zombie AI, firearms, and balanced gameplay, this modpack provides a thrilling, high-stakes survival experience where teamwork and strategy are key. Perfect for servers, this modpack creates a relentless zombie apocalypse world, ready for groups of players to explore, defend, and survive together.

**Features:**  
- **Horde-Based Zombie Survival:** Zombies spawn in high numbers with improved AI, creating challenging situations that require teamwork and tactics to overcome.
- **Firearms and Limited Resources:** Access a range of firearms to fend off the undead, but manage your ammo carefully – supplies are scarce!
- **Server-Side Optimization:** Engineered to perform well in multiplayer environments, ensuring smooth gameplay for all players.
- **Dynamic Survival Experience:** Each playthrough brings new challenges, from defending outposts to scavenging for supplies, keeping gameplay fresh and intense.

**Gameplay Tips:**  
- Stick together; going solo can be risky when zombies are in large groups.
- Conserve ammunition and use melee weapons to avoid attracting more zombies.
- Designate roles within your group for the best survival strategy – some players can guard while others gather resources.

**Perfect for Community and Friend Group Play**  
The *Zombie Apocalypse Server* Modpack transforms any multiplayer server into a world of relentless zombie survival. With optimized performance and immersive gameplay, it’s ideal for communities and friend groups looking for an engaging and challenging experience.
